formatting.emphasisSyntax: Wrap any word or phrase in **double asterisks** inside a paragraph text string to emphasize it.

paragraphs.text: WELCOME, TRAVELLER... I SEE YOU WISH TO KNOW MORE OF THE OUTLAW RESIDING IN THESE MOUNTAINS... FOR NOW THEY CALL HIM AN **ARTIFICER OF SOUND**, BUT I REMEMBER HIS IDLE DAYS AS A WANDERING MINSTREL. A SCOUNDREL HE WAS, TOOTING ON HIS SAXOPHONE WITH NO THOUGHT TO THE CONSEQUENCES...

THAT WAS UNTIL, OF COURSE, HIS APPRENTICESHIP AT **REAL WORLD STUDIOS**. HE LEARNED HIS CRAFT THERE FOR A NUMBER OF YEARS, SERVING UNDER SUCH SAGES AS JACK ANTONOFF, DAN CAREY AND JOHN PARISH, AND EVENTUALLY EARNING A **GRAMMY AWARD** FOR HIS WORK ON PETER GABRIEL'S I/O...

..AND YET FOR ALL THE WISE COUNCIL HE RECEIVED, DISTANT LANDS CALLED HIM AWAY. **MY WIZARD'S OATH FORBIDS ME** TO PRACTISE OTHER COLOURS OF MAGIC, YET THIS MUSHROOM CAP SAW FIT TO EMBARK ON THE ROAD WITH TRAVELLING TROUPES...
UPON THE CONTINENT AND ACROSS THE WIDE BLUE OCEAN, HE WORKED AS A **BACKLINE TECHNICIAN** FOR SUCH WONDROUS TROUBADOURS AS **BIRDY**, **SNOW PATROL** AND **PETER GABRIEL**.
..AND YES, TRAVELLER, HE COULD NOT EVEN
